calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-26-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amy Hunt appeared by zoom for petitioner.

Mrs. Hunt stated that she is not aware of any objections. The court noted that the wrong form of order was used. Mrs. Hunt stated that she tried to comply with the local rule, and that she did it wrong, but everyone received notice of the hearing with the remote appearance information. The court waives the issue of notice. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is under submission with the intent to grant. The court will appoint Walter Cohn as the executor without bond. Status on close of estate is set for August 28, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-04-2023 Continued To Apr-25-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Amy Hunt appearing via CourtCall for Petitioner Walter Cohn.

Mrs. Hunt confirmed that she did not comply with the requirement of providing notice of the remote appearance procedure timely, stated that she sent it to the niece, the nephew and the two sisters via email on Friday and that she received conformation from three of them but not from Patricia. The Court expressed concern stating that if the holographic will is admitted, the two sisters will no longer take as heirs and that it wants to make sure they have the opportunity to object if that's what they choose to do. Mrs. Hunt addressed the issue of bond stating that if the holographic will is admitted than Walter is the sole beneficiary of the house, that $8,000 to $10,000 would be left and will be eaten up by costs and that she sees no reason for a bond. The Petition for Probate of will and letters testamentary is continued to April 25, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel to file proof of service on said notices.

Judge: Stephen Murphy; Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Martinez. Not reported.
